global.description: The ad features a dark background with a central product display and prominent discount messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time discount on a product.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: product display
elements.description: A rectangular product display area with a subtle outline, suggesting a product or app interface.

elements.label: decorative element
elements.description: A simple, abstract shape within the product display area, adding visual interest.

elements.label: decorative element
elements.description: A small, abstract shape positioned within the product display area, enhancing the design.

elements.label: discount offer
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Up to 40% off Only this weekend' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Only this weekend

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: The logo 'LuxShelf' appears at the top, styled in a modern font.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Try for free' at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '30%' at the bottom, indicating a discount.

elements.label: sale announcement
elements.description: The word 'SALE' in bold text at the top, drawing attention to the promotional event.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' in a small font at the top, possibly indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, product display in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
